description_long: This object consists of two stacked books bound together by a wide, orange strap. The covers of both books are a rich brown color with irregular black stains or markings, giving them a weathered, vintage appearance. The spines of the books feature small gold accents, possibly representing decorative bands or clasps. The pages are visible along the sides and appear to be a clean, off-white color. The orange strap is textured and wraps tightly around the books, suggesting they are meant to be carried together. The overall look is utilitarian yet aged, suitable for an urban explorer or student.
description: Two brown, weathered books stacked and bound by a wide orange strap, with gold spine accents and visible white pages.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white pages of both books and the orange strap running horizontally across the covers.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gold accents on the spines and the full width of the orange strap.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with visible white pages and the orange strap, but less detail on the spines.
description_view_3: Top-down view displaying the brown, stained covers and the orange strap running vertically down the center.
attribute_spine_design: The spines are brown with small gold decorative bands, but no visible text or elaborate patterns. The design is simple and classic.
